V0200A18A_RSTRNT_CTR_CD V0200A18A_RSTRNT_CTR_CD V0200A18A Restraint Care Area Trigger Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Physical Restraints CA was triggered. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
599 V0200A18B_RSTRNT_CPL_CD V0200A18B_RSTRNT_CPL_CD V0200A18B Restraint Addressed in Care Plan Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Physical Restraints care area was addressed in the care plan. -=Not assessed/no
